positive: Minimalist botanical abstract. A delicate, central composition featuring various stylized tropical leaves (monstera, palm, fern) interwoven with delicate white floral elements and winding vines. The overall aesthetic should be symmetrical and elegant, rendered in a limited color palette of deep emerald green, jade green, and creamy off-white. Strong black outlines define the silhouettes, giving the piece a sophisticated linocut or engraved sketch style. The composition should be perfectly balanced and centered, optimized for single-color printing on fabric, with clean, high-contrast shapes and negative space emphasized. Studio lighting, high detail, vector art style.
